note: Baseline metrics — estimated from codebase analysis (no live Lighthouse available in CI)

metrics.estimatedLCP: < 2.0s (static HTML, no blocking JS for initial paint)
metrics.estimatedCLS: < 0.15 (ad slots have min-height reservation, but placeholder may shift)

knownRisks: Ad slots (adSlot.js) may cause CLS if min-height is insufficient
Chart.js / lightweight-charts lazy loading may delay chart render
External API calls (goldpricez.com, open.er-api.com) add network latency
Service worker precaches 50+ URLs — first install may be slow

vulnerabilities.details: esbuild <=0.24.2 dev server vulnerability (no production impact)
